title: Big tobacco uses cigarette playbook to help sell ultra-processed foods, journal reveals - The Guardian
summary_full: Big tobacco uses cigarette playbook to help sell ultra-processed foods, journal reveals  The GuardianAmericans say they want strict regulations on ultraprocessed food. Will industry and regulators deliver?  CNNTop ultra-processed food researchers call for sweeping policy change: ‘The system is rigged’  statnews.comColumn: Americans’ diets can be traced through the evolution of food labels, with ultra-processed foods (UPFs) now emerging as a new category. But there is no standardized definition of what counts as a UPF — leaving the classification open to debate. https:  facebook.comUltra-processed foods and cardiometabolic risk: from evidence to policy  Nature
